steps.title: Read constantly in context
steps.content: Alexander is described as very busy, avoiding clubs, usually dining alone, and being at work almost constantly for several days. In this context, constantly describes how continuously he worked.

steps.title: Remove wrong meanings
steps.content: A means a sufficient amount, C describes speed, and D describes caution. None expresses the duration of continuous work. The needed meaning is without stopping or nearly without pause. The answer is B.
